---
title: "Turbine and Foundation Installation"
---

## Role in the Model

Turbine and foundation installation converts component supply cost into installed offshore asset cost.

## Current Assumptions

| Item | Assumption |
|---|---:|
| Foundation installation | 1 million EUR/turbine |
| Turbine installation | Included in current turbine/foundation assumption set unless separated later |

The current source material provides a separate foundation installation cost but does not yet provide a full vessel-based turbine installation model.

## Cost Drivers

Future installation modelling should account for:

- turbine rating
- turbine mass and hub height
- foundation mass
- water depth
- distance to port
- weather downtime
- vessel day rate
- installation duration

## Related Components

- [Wind Turbine](../turbine_system/wind_turbine.qmd)
- [Foundation](../turbine_system/foundation.qmd)
- [Tower, Nacelle, and Mass](../turbine_system/tower_nacelle_and_mass.qmd)
